consolidation_decisions: Extended .claude/rules/00-core-workflow.md instead of adding a competing 00-operating-doctrine.md; it already held that role.
10-karpathy-guidelines.md contains only content not already in surgical-density.md (assumption-surfacing, verify-before-done, metric-gated experiment loops); surgical-density.md was left untouched.

20-lifecycle-gates.md documents the five-gate contract only; no /brainstorm, /research, /plan, /build, /ship, /handoff, /status, or /experiment command files were added, per the task's explicit scope limit.
30-skill-taxonomy.md documents the two-axis convention the existing 57-skill/5-command corpus already followed; it was not a rewrite of that corpus.
docs/adr/ is a new, distinct location from the pre-existing .claude/docs/decision-log.md; the decision log stays chronological narrative, ADRs are scoped and supersedable records.

verification_commands.notes: 65 tests total (54 prior + 11 new), no regression
3 new rule files registered; 00-core-workflow.md re-validated after extension
nothing ignored; all evidence is git-visible

scope_explicitly_excluded: Phase 5B/5C: /bootstrap-control-plane installer, cross-stack proof, main-thread context measurement on multi-plan work
Phase 6: determinism ladder promotions/demotions, adversarial verification battery
Implementing the five lifecycle-gate commands themselves (/brainstorm, /research, /plan, /build, /verify, /ship)
remaining_risks: The five-gate lifecycle contract is documentation only; no gate command exists yet.
The duplicate-responsibility check compares exact description strings, not paraphrase similarity.

The global-path-dependency check does not scan .claude/skills/ or .claude/agents/; a manual grep found 7 skill files with descriptive (non-functional) ~/.claude mentions, not mechanically verified as non-dependencies.
Phases 5B, 5C, 6, and 7 remain incomplete and are not implicitly validated by these Phase 5A changes.
next_goal: Phase 5A is complete. Do not begin Phase 5B/5C or Phase 6 until explicitly directed.
